root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.method_recieve_dividend ,( select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno where sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and paid_dividen = '1' and bank_id = '06' ) as bank_acc_no_06 ,( select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno where sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and paid_dividen = '1' and bank_id = '00' ) as bank_acc_no_00 ,( select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno where sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and paid_dividen = '1' and bank_id = '25' ) as bank_acc_no_25 FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011001' and '011001' ) ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC
